approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context presents fair value through profit or loss as the default accounting model for financial instruments measured at fair value, with gains and losses recognised in profit or loss unless a specified exception applies.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context separately presents hedge accounting as a distinct accounting model for forward contracts and other instruments, with recognition and presentation effects that differ from direct profit or loss treatment.
